title: Update medium.py rendezvous to use computed hop channel from SFN/EUI; remove dead code
description: Ensure get_rx_candidates, detect_activity, and start_tx in medium.py use synchronized hop channel computed from SFN/time/EUI (via hop_schedule or helper). Align with CCP-12. Eliminate any unused channel logic or dead code. Update tests if needed. Reference test vectors.
